news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois, as of July 3, 2025, three out of four tracking metrics have shown positive results for the month. The unemployment rate for technology occupations has decreased to under 3% in June, as businesses have hired more tech professionals. This data was reported by CompTIA, a prominent global provider of technology certifications and resources.
news.headline: Tech hiring surges, with tech unemployment rate falling below 3% in June. 3 of 4 metrics positive: CompTIA report.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Columbus, GA, shared their motivation for creating a new hunting chair, stating, "I wanted to offer a lighter and more comfortable option." Their innovative design aims to enhance versatility for hunters transitioning between tree stands and stationary positions. The specifics regarding the chair's weight, comfort features, and adaptability were not disclosed in the news release.
news.headline: Inventor from Colombus, GA creates TPL-472 hunting chair for improved comfort and versatility in hunting. #Innovation

news.summary: The largest asset manager in Europe is raising concerns about the potential impact of the US GENIUS Act, stating that it may inadvertently lead to a depreciation of the US dollar and cause disturbances in worldwide payment systems.
news.headline: Amundi cautions against GENIUS Act potentially weakening dollar dominance, risking global payments.

news.summary: In Livingston, New Jersey, on July 3, 2025, CoreWeave (Nasdaq: CRWV) revealed as the pioneering AI cloud provider in deploying the newest NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems for clients. They are set to expand these deployments globally, marking a significant leap in their technological reach. The NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 systems promise enhanced capabilities for CoreWeave's AI services.
news.headline: CoreWeave (CRWV) is first to deploy NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 for customers, plans to scale worldwide.

news.summary: In Lugano, Switzerland on July 3, 2025, BE OPEN announced the recipients of the Public Vote and Founder's Choice Prizes in the Designing Futures 2050 competition. news.summary: In Phoenix on July 2, 2025, ten students have been granted an $80,000 donation from Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona Health Choice to participate in the Bridge Fellowship Program provided by the Mel and Enid Zuckerman Foundation. This initiative allows students to gain insight into healthcare operations outside of traditional clinical settings.
news.headline: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona Health Choice donates $80K to support 10 U of A Health students in Bridge Fellowship Program.

news.summary: A contract worth around $260 million has been granted to SOSi by the United States Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), based in Reston, Va. As per the agreement, SOSi will deliver foreign language assistance for the DEA's Title III electronic surveillance initiative, covering services such as monitoring, transcription, translation, interpretation, validation, and analysis of lawfully intercepted communications. This partnership will extend across 241 DEA offices nationwide, enhancing the company's support for the agency.
news.headline: SOSi secures $260M DEA contract for foreign language support, covering 241 offices across the US.

news.summary: In Ontario, Schneider Electric has introduced the third chapter of its Sustainability School, an online program aimed at educating its channel partners to excel in sustainability. This free training will emphasize the importance of decarbonization and showcase the advantages of sustainability via electrification and digitalization. The program is designed to equip businesses with the necessary tools to reduce their carbon footprint and gain a competitive edge. This initiative aligns with their leadership in energy management and automation.
news.headline: Schneider Electric launches Chapter 3 of Sustainability School, aiming to empower partners in sustainability.

news.summary: In Tokyo, webCG has achieved a new Guinness World Record™ by covering a remarkable distance of 1,045 kilometers on a single charge with an electric vehicle (EV). This achievement marks the longest distance traveled by an EV on a single charge, showcasing the impressive capabilities of the vehicle.
news.headline: webCG sets Guinness World Record™ with EV traveling 1,045 km on a single charge, breaking previous record.

news.summary: Mercury Insurance, based in Los Angeles, was recently acknowledged for its outstanding workplace culture, flexibility, and support for working families. The company has earned a spot on Newsweek's prestigious 2025 lists of America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families and America's Greatest Workplaces. This recognition highlights Mercury Insurance's commitment to providing a conducive work environment and strong support system for its employees. The company's dedication to fostering a family-friendly workplace has led to this significant achievement in being recognized among top workplaces in the country.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance recognized for workplace culture, flexibility, and support for families by Newsweek in 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Altoona, Florida shared his thoughts on creating a better system for dust removal in work areas. The inventor, a tile installer, introduced THE DUST DOME as a unique solution to traditional dust barriers. This innovative design aims to enhance dust control measures with improved efficiency.
news.headline: Inventor from Florida creates Dust Dome system for better dust management in work areas.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, the University of Houston Law Center made an announcement via PRNewswire regarding the appointment of Joshua Lake as the new director of its Criminal Justice Clinic and professor of practice. Joshua Lake assumed his role on July 1, 2025, and he is recognized for his extensive background in criminal justice and legal defense spanning over ten years.
news.headline: Joshua Lake appointed as director of UH Law's Criminal Justice Clinic. More than a decade of experience. Effective July 1, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. This decrease represents approximately 500,000 people finding employment. Additionally, the report shows that the economy has grown by 3.2% in the last quarter, outperforming predictions by 0.5%. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and a surge in manufacturing output. Overall, these figures indicate a positive trend in the country's economy, with more people finding jobs and contributing to economic growth.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Mesa Laboratories, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: MLAB). Shareholders of record on August 29, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 15, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company's Board of Directors.
news.headline: Mesa Labs declares quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share, payable on Sept. 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on Aug. 29.
